ideas.intro: Ideas for projects, activities, books, games, and more for students with a high level of interest.

items.content:
[ ] (Mythology) View some of the different maps that have been made about Christian/Christiana's journeys. Students may want to follow along or even create one of their own to add to their Travel Journal. (See Geography.)				
[ ] (Mythology) Act out your favorite part of the story.				
[ ] (Mythology) Tell the story to a friend or relative who has never heard it.			
[ ] (Mythology) Make a book of your illustrations and write captions for each.

[ ] (Mythology) Continue maps.				
[ ] (Mythology) Act out your favorite part of the story.				
[ ] (Mythology) Tell the story to a friend or relative who has never heard it.			
[ ] (Mythology) Make a book of your illustrations and write captions for each.

[ ] (Mythology) Continue maps.

[ ] (Mythology) Tell the story to a friend or relative who has never heard it.			
[ ] (Mythology) Make a book of your illustrations and write captions for each.

resources.title: D'Aulaire's Book of Greek Myths
resources.author: Ingri & Edgar Parin D'Aulaire
resources.rationale: A good introduction to the characters of Greek Mythology.
